hard_fail_conditions: Claims actual command execution, file creation, repository inspection, source mutation verification, XML parsing, or private project inspection for the calibration fixture.
Uses or requests raw XML bodies, generated page XML payloads, host-specific absolute paths, _workspaces outputs, _workmeta raw truth, credentials, cookies, secrets, or private-state data.
Leaks evaluator-only or golden-baseline wording into candidate-facing output.
Omits the required output shape or equivalent sidecars, manifest, index, provenance, warnings, downstream handoff, boundary review, and open questions.
Fails to preserve all 11 fixture source pages, source order, stable ids page_001 through page_011, source refs, and source sha256 values.
Fabricates or alters source refs, source_system_id, source page ids, source order, or sha256 values.
Mutates source page XML, makes XML body rewrite the default output, or claims derived XML variants are canonical source.
Omits page_module_spec_v0.yaml as the primary per-page sidecar.
Omits any required sidecar block: identity, module_definition, interfaces, performance, system_contract, composition, or evidence_review, even when values are unknown or review-required.
Omits any required system_contract section: electrical_domains, power_contract, signal_contract, or readiness_contract.
Promotes local/internal candidates to external harness interfaces without source-backed registration evidence.
Sets harness_ready true without source-backed enrichment evidence or replaces the boolean field with status-only text.
Records normalized_page_ref or normalized_sha256 as populated when annotation variants are disabled.
Treats annotation variants as required, canonical, or final source instead of optional project-local review artifacts.
Fills unit-bearing quantitative values as confirmed without status and evidence, or treats unsupported values as truth.
Performs or recommends material collection, MDD attachment, harness composition, connectivity inference, or final library registration during this workflow.
Routes downstream handoff anywhere other than capture_xml_intake_library_v0 or claims downstream intake was executed.
Claims generated sidecars, manifests, variants, or raw XML should be placed under .workflow as project outputs.
must_have_requirements: profile metadata includes model, reasoning effort, species, and class
fixture-specific 11 pages page_001 through page_011 preserved
source refs and sha256 values preserved exactly
required interface containers present even when empty
normalized refs blank/null/omitted when annotation variants disabled
module_spec_manifest and index record sidecar/source refs and checksums
provenance, warnings, downstream handoff, boundary review, and open questions present
